title: lilium washingtonianum var. rubescens
intro: Lilium washingtonianum var. rubescens, also known as the Pacific lily or Rubescens lily, is a variety of lily that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lilium washingtonianum var. rubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or tea, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
